title: Test HVAC Installation
description: HVAC system installation for community centre

specifications: Compliance with all relevant building codes and regulations
items.notes: Includes site survey and detailed system design drawings.

items.description: Supply and Installation of High-Efficiency HVAC Units (2 x 25-ton units)
specifications: High-efficiency variable refrigerant flow (VRF) units with SEER rating of 20 or higher
Specific model details available upon request
items.notes: Units to be selected based on load calculations and client preferences.  Includes all necessary refrigerant and piping materials.

specifications: Use of high-quality galvanized steel ductwork
Proper sealing and insulation to minimize air leakage and improve energy efficiency
items.notes: Detailed ductwork layout provided in engineering design. Quantity subject to final site survey.

specifications: Installation of all necessary electrical wiring, controls, and safety devices
Compliance with all relevant electrical codes
items.notes: Includes installation of smart thermostats and energy management systems if requested.

specifications: Thorough testing and commissioning of the complete HVAC system
Verification of energy efficiency and compliance
items.notes: Ensuring the system operates at peak efficiency and meets all project specifications.

specifications: Regular on-site inspections and coordination of subcontractors
items.notes: Ensuring smooth project execution and timely completion.

terms_conditions: All work will be performed in accordance with industry best practices and applicable building codes.
Payment schedules are outlined in the payment terms section.
Changes to the scope of work will be subject to a change order process.
Any permits required for the project will be the responsibility of the client.
We are not liable for delays caused by factors outside our reasonable control.
payment_terms: A 25% deposit is required upon contract signing.  50% will be due upon completion of installation, and 25% final payment upon successful commissioning and testing of the HVAC system.
delivery_terms: All materials and equipment will be delivered to the project site within 7 days of contract signing. Installation will commence after the project site is prepared.
warranty_terms: A one-year parts and labor warranty will be provided upon completion of the project.
special_requirements: Client to provide access to the site and utilities.
Client to ensure the site is properly prepared for installation (e.g., adequate power supply, access to work area).
